# UC-15.4.13 · APC PDU SNMP Branch Circuit Load Balancing Analysis

## Description

Phase imbalance increases neutral current and breaker stress; PDUs expose per-phase draw for re-cabling decisions.

## Value

Improves utilization without new circuits.

## Implementation

(1) Three-phase PDUs only. (2) Export top imbalanced PDUs quarterly.

## SPL

```spl
index=power sourcetype="snmp:apc:pdu" earliest=-24h
| eval l1=tonumber(coalesce(rPDUPhaseStatusLoad, phase_l1_amps, ""))/10
| eval l2=tonumber(coalesce(rPDUPhaseStatusLoad2, phase_l2_amps, ""))/10
| eval l3=tonumber(coalesce(rPDUPhaseStatusLoad3, phase_l3_amps, ""))/10
| eval imbalance=max(max(abs(l1-l2),abs(l2-l3)),abs(l3-l1))
| stats avg(l1) as avg_l1 avg(l2) as avg_l2 avg(l3) as avg_l3 avg(imbalance) as avg_imbalance by pdu_name
```

## Visualization

Grouped bar L1–L3; imbalance KPI.

## References

- [Schneider Electric — APC product support](https://www.se.com/ww/en/product-category/3100-2000-pdu/)
- [Splunk Connect for SNMP](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/apps#/search=connect%20for%20snmp)
